domainsList.title: The Heritage Estate
domainsList.description: A unique terroir nestled in the heart of the valley, shaped by generations of farmers who have preserved ancestral gestures and the richness of the soil.

domainsList.title: The Springs of the Atlas
domainsList.description: A unique terroir nestled in the heart of the valley, where sustainable agriculture and respect for natural cycles give birth to products of exceptional quality.

domainsList.title: The School of the Peaks
domainsList.description: A unique terroir nestled in the heart of the valley, benefiting from an ideal microclimate and generous sunshine that give the harvests all their typicity.

domainsList.title: The Women's Workshop of the High Atlas
domainsList.description: A space dedicated to creation and the transmission of ancestral know-how. Weaving, sewing, and promotion of local products to offer women sustainable economic independence.

domainsList.title: The Forest for Future Generations
domainsList.description: A vast program for planting fruit trees and protecting mountain ecosystems. Each planted tree is a further step towards the climate resilience of the douars and the preservation of biodiversity.
